mapper.sql: id, transform_no, transform_desc, sys_no, dept_id, year, achievement, source_proj, source_proj_name, source_patent, source_patent_name, transform_type, agr_type, agr_no, agr_date, agr_start_date, agr_end_date, fee_amt, pay_mode, achv_unit_prop, partner_unit_prop, transformants, achv_unit, achv_addr, achv_post_code, achv_head, achv_headtel, partner_unit, partner_unit_addr, partner_unit_postcode, partner_unit_tel, agent_name, agent_unit, agent_unit_tel, agent_unit_addr, agent_unit_postcode, create_date, create_time, create_user_id, sub_user_id, sub_date, sub_time, data_status, chk_status, chk_user_id, chk_date, chk_time, chk_desc, remark
mapper.select:
select satm.id as rowId,satm.transform_no as transformNo,satm.transform_desc as transformDesc,satm.data_status as dataStatus ,satm.achv_headtel as achvHeadtel,huser.id as "achvHead.id",huser.name as "achvHead.name", csy.code as "year.id",csy.name as "year.name",fdept.id as "deptId.id",fdept.name as "deptId.name", csat.code as "transformType.id",csat.name as "transformType.name",csata.code as "agrType.id",csata.name as "agrType.name", spi.id as "sourcePatent.id",spi.name as "sourcePatent.name",spji.id as "sourceProj.id",spji.name as "sourceProj.name", satm.remark as remark,satm.create_date as createDate,cuser.name as createUserName,satm.agr_no as agrNo, satm.fee_amt as feeAmt,satm.partner_unit_prop as partnerUnitProp,satm.achv_unit_prop as achvUnitProp, satm.agr_date as agrDate,satm.agr_start_date as agrStartDate,satm.agr_end_date as agrEndDate,satm.partner_unit as partnerUnit, satm.partner_unit_addr as partnerUnitAddr, satm.partner_unit_postcode as partnerUnitPostcode,satm.partner_unit_tel as partnerUnitTel, satm.achv_unit as achvUnit,satm.achv_addr as achvAddr,satm.achv_post_code as achvPostCode from srm_achv_transformation satm left join ct_srm_year csy on csy.code=satm.year left join ct_srm_dept fdept on fdept.id=satm.dept_id left join ct_srm_user cuser on cuser.id=satm.create_user_id left join ct_srm_user huser on huser.id=satm.achv_head left join ct_srm_achv_transformants_type csat on csat.code=satm.transform_type left join ct_srm_achv_trans_agreement_type csata on csata.code=satm.agr_type left join ct_srm_pay_mode cspt on cspt.code=satm.pay_mode
left join srm_patent_info spi on spi.id=satm.source_patent left join srm_projects_info spji on spji.id=satm.source_proj where satm.id=#{rowId}

select satm.id as rowId,satm.transform_no as transformNo,satm.transform_desc as transformDesc,satm.data_status as dataStatus, satm.achv_headtel as achvHeadtel,huser.name as achvHeadName, csy.name as yearName,fdept.name as deptName, csat.name as transformTypeName,csata.name as agrTypeName, spi.name as sourcePatentName,spji.name as sourceProjName, satm.remark as remark,satm.create_date as createDate,cuser.name as createUserName,satm.agr_no as agrNo, satm.fee_amt as feeAmt,satm.partner_unit_prop as partnerUnitProp,satm.achv_unit_prop as achvUnitProp, satm.agr_date as agrDate,satm.agr_start_date as agrStartDate,satm.agr_end_date as agrEndDate,satm.partner_unit as partnerUnit, satm.partner_unit_addr as partnerUnitAddr, satm.partner_unit_postcode as partnerUnitPostcode,satm.partner_unit_tel as partnerUnitTel, satm.achv_unit as achvUnit,satm.achv_addr as achvAddr,satm.achv_post_code as achvPostCode from srm_achv_transformation satm left join ct_srm_year csy on csy.code=satm.year left join ct_srm_dept fdept on fdept.id=satm.dept_id left join ct_srm_user cuser on cuser.id=satm.create_user_id left join ct_srm_user huser on huser.id=satm.achv_head left join ct_srm_achv_transfer_type csat on csat.code=satm.transform_type left join ct_srm_achv_trans_agreement_type csata on csata.code=satm.agr_type left join ct_srm_pay_mode cspt on cspt.code=satm.pay_mode
left join srm_patent_info spi on spi.id=satm.source_patent left join srm_projects_info spji on spji.id=satm.source_proj where (satm.create_user_id=#{achvTransformationDto.userId} or satm.sub_user_id= #{achvTransformationDto.userId}) order by satm.id desc

select satm.id as rowId,satm.transform_no as transformNo,satm.transform_desc as transformDesc,satm.data_status as dataStatus, satm.achv_headtel as achvHeadtel,huser.name as achvHeadName, csy.name as yearName,fdept.name as deptName, csat.name as transformTypeName,csata.name as agrTypeName, spi.name as sourcePatentName,spji.name as sourceProjName, satm.remark as remark,satm.create_date as createDate,cuser.name as createUserName,satm.agr_no as agrNo, satm.fee_amt as feeAmt,satm.partner_unit_prop as partnerUnitProp,satm.achv_unit_prop as achvUnitProp, satm.agr_date as agrDate,satm.agr_start_date as agrStartDate,satm.agr_end_date as agrEndDate,satm.partner_unit as partnerUnit, satm.partner_unit_addr as partnerUnitAddr, satm.partner_unit_postcode as partnerUnitPostcode,satm.partner_unit_tel as partnerUnitTel, satm.achv_unit as achvUnit,satm.achv_addr as achvAddr,satm.achv_post_code as achvPostCode from srm_achv_transformation satm left join ct_srm_year csy on csy.code=satm.year left join ct_srm_dept fdept on fdept.id=satm.dept_id left join ct_srm_user cuser on cuser.id=satm.create_user_id left join ct_srm_user huser on huser.id=satm.achv_head left join ct_srm_achv_transfer_type csat on csat.code=satm.transform_type left join ct_srm_achv_trans_agreement_type csata on csata.code=satm.agr_type left join ct_srm_pay_mode cspt on cspt.code=satm.pay_mode
left join srm_patent_info spi on spi.id=satm.source_patent left join srm_projects_info spji on spji.id=satm.source_proj left join cf_srm_eaf_rec eafrec on eafrec.sys_no=satm.sys_no and eafrec.check_rec_id=satm.id where eafrec.step_no>1
and ( (satm.data_status=1 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{achvTransformationDto.userId}, '|%')) or (eafrec.step_no = (select max(step_no) from cf_srm_eaf_rec seafrec where satm.sys_no=seafrec.sys_no and seafrec.check_rec_id=satm.id) and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{achvTransformationDto.userId}, '|%') and eafrec.check_datetime is not null) or (satm.data_status=0 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.check_result=3 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{achvTransformationDto.userId}, '|%')) )
and satm.data_status=1 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{achvTransformationDto.userId}, '|%')
and satm.data_status=1 and eafrec.check_result="2" and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{achvTransformationDto.userId}, '|%')
and satm.data_status=0 and eafrec.check_result="3" and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{achvTransformationDto.userId}, '|%')
mapper.update:
update srm_achv_transformation
data_status = #{status},
transform_no = #{transformNo},
where id=#{rowId}
